consistency.data_completeness: High. All expected fields for a spell entity are present and populated.
consistency.internal_logic: Consistent. The components match the spell effects described (light, radiant damage, interaction with shapechangers). The scaling ('At Higher Levels') correctly references the base spell level.

quality.readability: Excellent. The description is clear, separating the initial setup, the ongoing effect, the specific shapechanger interaction, and the caster's upkeep action.
quality.formatting: Good. Uses bolding for the 'At Higher Levels' section, which aids readability.
quality.mechanic_clarity: Very clear. Damage dice (2d10), save type (Constitution), half damage on success, disadvantage for shapechangers, and required actions (casting, subsequent turns) are all explicitly stated.

mechanics.action_economy: 1 action to cast, 1 action per turn to move the beam.
mechanics.damage_profile: Radiant, variable (2d10 + 1d10 per slot level above 2nd), applied at the start of the creature's turn or upon entry into the area.
mechanics.notable_interactions: Strong anti-shapechanger effect, forcing reversion and preventing transformation while within the light.

suggested_improvements: None immediately apparent; this is a standard, well-defined spell format.
